methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.DockerVolumes.__init__
documentation:
Docker Volumes interface.

```
param container_path

Job Runtime Container Path Host Path.

param host_path

EC2 Runner Host Path.
```

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.DockerVolumes.container_path
documentation:
Job Runtime Container Path Host Path.

Example:

```
- /tmp/cahce
more detail see https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section
```

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.DockerVolumes.host_path
documentation:
EC2 Runner Host Path.

Example:

```
- /tmp/cahce
more detail see https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section
```

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscaling.__init__
documentation:
---
param automatic_restart: 'If true, automatically restart instances on maintenance
  events. See <https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/live-migration#autorestart>
  Default: - false'
param compute_network: 'VPC for the Gitlab Runner . Default: - A new VPC will be created.'
param concurrent: 'gitlab runner run task concurrent at the same time. Default: -
  1'
param default_disk_size_gb: 'Gitlab Runner instance Disk size. Default: - 60 GB.'
param desired_capacity: 'Desired capacity limit for autoscaling group. Default: -
  minCapacity, and leave unchanged during deployment'
param docker_volumes: 'add another Gitlab Container Runner Docker Volumes Path at
  job runner runtime. more detail see <https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section>
  Default: - already mount "/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock"'
param download_gitlab_runner_binary_url: 'The source URL used to install the gitlab-runner
  onto the VM host os. Passed to curl via cloud-config runcmd. Default: - "<https://gitlab-runner-downloads.s3.amazonaws.com/latest/binaries/gitlab-runner-linux-amd64>"'
param gitlab_token: Gitlab token.
param gitlab_url: 'Gitlab Runner register url . Default: - <https://gitlab.com/> ,
  The trailing slash is mandatory.'
param id: '-'
param machine_type: 'Runner default EC2 instance type. Default: -'
param network_tags: Firewall rules for the Gitlab Runner.
param preemptible: If true, create preemptible VM instances intended to reduce cost.
  Note, the MIG will recreate pre-empted instnaces. See <https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/preemptible>
param provider: Google Cloud Provider.
param scope: '-'
param service_account: The Service Account to be used by the Gitlab Runner.
param tags: 'tags for the runner. Default: - [''runner'', ''gitlab'', ''awscdk'']'
---

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscaling.create_metadata_startup_script
documentation:
---
param automatic_restart: 'If true, automatically restart instances on maintenance

  Default: - false'

param desired_capacity: 'Desired capacity limit for autoscaling group. Default: -
  minCapacity, and leave unchanged during deployment'
param docker_volumes: 'add another Gitlab Container Runner Docker Volumes Path at
  job runner runtime. more detail see <https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section>
  Default: - already mount "/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock"'
param download_gitlab_runner_binary_url: 'The source URL used to install the gitlab-runner
  onto the VM host os. Passed to curl via cloud-config runcmd. Default: - "<https://gitlab-runner-downloads.s3.amazonaws.com/latest/binaries/gitlab-runner-linux-amd64>"'
param gitlab_token: Gitlab token.
param gitlab_url: 'Gitlab Runner register url . Default: - <https://gitlab.com/> ,
  The trailing slash is mandatory.'
param machine_type: 'Runner default EC2 instance type. Default: -'
param network_tags: Firewall rules for the Gitlab Runner.
param preemptible: If true, create preemptible VM instances intended to reduce cost.
  Note, the MIG will recreate pre-empted instnaces. See <https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/preemptible>
param provider: Google Cloud Provider.
param service_account: The Service Account to be used by the Gitlab Runner.
param tags: 'tags for the runner. Default: - [''runner'', ''gitlab'', ''awscdk'']'
return: Array.
---

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.gitlab_token
documentation:
Gitlab token.

Example:

```
new GitlabRunnerAutoscaling(stack, 'runner', { gitlabToken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN' });
```

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.provider
documentation: Google Cloud Provider.

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.automatic_restart
documentation:
If true, automatically restart instances on maintenance events.

See https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/live-migration#autorestart

:default: - false

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.compute_network
cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.concurrent
documentation:
gitlab runner run task concurrent at the same time.

:default: - 1

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.default_disk_size_gb
documentation:
Gitlab Runner instance Disk size.

:default: - 60 GB.

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.desired_capacity
documentation:
Desired capacity limit for autoscaling group.

```
default

minCapacity, and leave unchanged during deployment
```

Example:

```
new GitlabRunnerAutoscaling(stack, 'runner', { gitlabToken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN', desiredCapacity: 2 });
```

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.docker_volumes
documentation:
add another Gitlab Container Runner Docker Volumes Path at job runner runtime.

more detail see <https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section>

```
default

already mount "/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock"
```

Example:

```
dockerVolumes: [
  {
    hostPath: '/tmp/cache',
    containerPath: '/tmp/cache',
  },
],
```

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.download_gitlab_runner_binary_url
documentation:
The source URL used to install the gitlab-runner onto the VM host os.

Passed to curl via cloud-config runcmd.

:default: - "https://gitlab-runner-downloads.s3.amazonaws.com/latest/binaries/gitlab-runner-linux-amd64"

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.gitlab_url
documentation:
Gitlab Runner register url .

```
default

https://gitlab.com/ , The trailing slash is mandatory.
```

Example:

```
const runner = new GitlabRunnerAutoscaling(stack, 'runner', { gitlabToken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN',gitlabUrl: 'https://gitlab.com/'});
```

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.machine_type
documentation:
Runner default EC2 instance type.

```
default

```

Example:

```
new GitlabRunnerAutoscaling(stack, 'runner', { gitlabToken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN', instanceType: 't3.small' });
```

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.network_tags
documentation: Firewall rules for the Gitlab Runner.

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.preemptible
documentation:
If true, create preemptible VM instances intended to reduce cost.

Note, the MIG will recreate pre-empted instnaces.
See https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/instances/preemptible

:deafult: - true

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.service_account
documentation: The Service Account to be used by the Gitlab Runner.

methods.name: cdktf_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.tags
documentation:
tags for the runner.

:default: - ['runner', 'gitlab', 'awscdk']
